action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 6 achieved a new best worst-region accuracy of 0.4597, improving over the baseline. However, the validation worst-region accuracy peaked at 0.5928 and then degraded, indicating overfitting to majority regions at the expense of minority regions. Analysis: To improve OOD generalization and directly address the worst-region metric, I will implement three powerful techniques: 1) Region-Weighted Loss (Importance Weighting) using the square root of inverse region frequencies to balance the learning signal across regions. 2) Exponential Moving Average (EMA) of model weights, which is highly effective for OOD robustness. 3) Increased regularization via Dropout (0.4) and ColorJitter augmentation. Decision: Update train.py to include region weighting and EMA. Evaluate both the regular and EMA models during validation and save the absolute best one. Train for 12 epochs.
